greeting: Hi! Welcome to The Hairy Dog. I'm the virtual receptionist. What can we help your furry friend with today?

faq.a: Yes! Call us at (602) 333-0447 to schedule your grooming appointment.
Most sessions take 1.5-2 hours depending on breed, size, and coat condition.
We're in Phoenix, Arizona. Call for the exact address.
We specialize in dogs. Please call us to see if we can accommodate cats.
Yes! With 266+ reviews at 4.6 stars, our experienced groomers handle dogs of all sizes and breeds.

faq.q: What if my dog is anxious?
faq.a: We're experienced with nervous pups and use gentle, patient techniques.

escalation: Great question! Let me have a groomer get back to you. Call us at (602) 333-0447.
